failure_modes: False positives due to short-term fluctuations misidentified as long-term trends.
Missing individuals with genuine but less pronounced declines.
Over-reliance on deterministic features, neglecting nuanced patterns.
guardrails: Cross-validate signals across activity, sleep, and exposure metrics.
Avoid flagging individuals with only one declining metric.
Consider the magnitude of the slopes and deltas, not just the direction.
Be cautious of individuals with high absolute activity/sleep values but small declines.
planner_result.strategy: Focus on identifying citizens with declining activity and sleep indices, coupled with rising environmental exposure, as indicators of suboptimal well-being trajectories. Prioritize candidates with multiple consecutive declines and negative slopes in activity and sleep, and positive slopes in exposure. Leverage risk_hint as a secondary sorting signal.
